name: Ocean Beach
description: The iconic beachfront district of Vice City, featuring luxury hotels, nightclubs, and stunning ocean views. A hub for early-game missions and activities.

name: Little Havana
description: A vibrant cultural district with Latin-inspired architecture, street food vendors, and underground fight clubs. Key location for story missions.

name: Star Island Safehouse
description: An exclusive island residence available for purchase mid-game. Features a private dock, helipad, and underground garage with space for 20 vehicles.

name: Malibu Nightclub
description: A purchasable nightclub business in downtown Vice City. Generates passive income and serves as a front for illicit operations.

name: Hidden Package #1 — Pier
description: Located under the Ocean Beach pier, accessible by swimming or using a boat. The first of 50 hidden packages scattered across Vice City.

name: The Diamond Casino & Resort
description: Vice City's premier entertainment venue. Home to the Diamond Casino Heist, one of the most lucrative activities in the game.

name: Everglades Airstrip
description: A remote airstrip in the Everglades used for smuggling missions. Access to planes and helicopters once unlocked.
